input.notes: Corpus review confirmed that `yahoo-data-breaches-2013.md` currently combines the unattributed 2013 Yahoo breach and the separately attributed 2014 FSB-directed breach into one plural incident page. The article was tightened for accuracy, but it should ultimately be split into separate canonical incident entries with distinct eventIds and a deliberate legacy-handling plan for the current umbrella slug.

history.note: Queued follow-on reprocess after corpus review found that the Yahoo page still served two separate historical breaches under one canonical incident article.
